name: Ajwain Mellow - Millet Cookies
desc1: Crunch into wholesome goodness with our Ajwain Mellow - Millet Cookies, a perfect fusion of tradition and taste. Made with nutritious little millet and wheat, and infused with the aromatic warmth of ajwain, jeera, and pepper, these cookies deliver a savoury crunch that's both delicious and nourishing.
desc2: Packed with fiber for better digestion, heart-friendly nutrients, and niacin that helps manage cholesterol, every bite supports your wellness journey. The natural spices also help detoxify the body, making these cookies a smart snack you can enjoy guilt-free.

name: Crunchy Cardamom - Millet Cookies
desc1: Indulge in the delightful crunch of our Crunchy Cardamom - Millet Cookies, crafted with wholesome finger millet and wheat, sweetened naturally with jaggery powder, and enriched with the aromatic goodness of cardamom and coconut powder.
desc2: Each bite offers a perfect balance of traditional flavour and nourishing ingredients. These cookies are packed with antimicrobial properties, help support healthy blood glucose levels, and are a rich source of calcium for stronger bones.
desc3: Packed with fiber for better digestion, heart-friendly nutrients, and niacin that helps manage cholesterol, every bite supports your wellness journey. The natural spices also help detoxify the body, making these cookies a smart snack you can enjoy guilt-free.

name: Millet Choc – Millet Cookies
desc1: A delicious treat for kids love and parents trust! Millet Choc Cookies combine the goodness of finger millet and wheat with the rich taste of cocoa and natural chocolate flavour, sweetened naturally with jaggery powder. Every crunchy bite delivers the irresistible chocolaty taste packed with powerful nutrition of millets.
desc2: Loved by children for their chocolate flavour, these cookies also help support balanced blood glucose levels while providing calcium that contributes to strong bones and healthy growth.

name: Spicy Dhamaka – Millet Cookies
desc1: Turn up the flavour with our Spicy Dhamaka - Millet Cookies, made with pearl millet and wheat, blended with bold spices like pepper, jeera, ajwain, and a touch of salt.
desc2: These crunchy, savoury cookies deliver a burst of traditional spice in every bite and packed with wholesome goodness of millets.
desc3: They help reduce cholesterol, are a rich source of calcium, and promote heart health. With ingredients that support intestinal health and aid in weight management, these cookies are the perfect balance of spice and nutrition.

name: Tango Fruity – Millet Cookies
desc1: Bring a burst of fruity fun to your snack time with Tango Fruity - Millet Cookies! Made with a wholesome mix of foxtail, kodo, little, barnyard, and pearl millets, wheat, mixed natural fruit flavours, tutti-frutti, and jaggery powder, these cookies are a crunchy, naturally sweet delight.
desc2: Packed with calcium for strong bones, dietary fiber for healthy digestion, and a low glycaemic index for balanced energy, they are also a good source of iron, making them a truly nourishing treat for all ages.

name: Foxtail Millet Noodles
desc1: Made with nutritious Foxtail Millet, blended with wholesome wheat flour and natural cluster bean powder, this delicious Millet Noodles brings together traditional grains and a rich aromatic spice mix for a flavourful and healthy experience. Our special spice mix combines traditional ingredients like coriander, cumin, fennel, turmeric, curry leaves, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, and more to create a perfectly balanced tast
content: Supports Cardiac Health – Helps maintain a healthy heart.
Supports Nervous System – Nutrients that aid proper nerve function.
Boosts Immunity – Packed with natural antioxidants.
Promotes Skin & Hair Health – Rich nutrients for overall wellness.
Boil noodles in 600 ml water for 5 minutes.
Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix with 1 spoon oil.
Stir-fry onion & vegetables in 2 tbsp oil for 2–3 minutes.
Add spice mix & noodles, toss well and serve hot.

name: Foxtail Millet Laddu
desc1: Made with a mix of nutritious Multi Millets, blended with wholesome wheat flour and natural cluster bean powder, this delicious Millet Noodles brings together traditional grains and a rich aromatic spice mix for a flavourful and healthy experience. name: Kodo Millet Laddu
desc1: Elevate your wellness with our artisanal Kodo Millet Laddu, where ancient grains meet refined taste. Handcrafted with golden ghee, creamy butter, natural jaggery powder, crunchy cashews, and a delicate hint of cardamom, each laddu is a luxurious blend of flavour and nutrition.
desc2: These laddus support digestion, fortify the nervous system, and offer special metabolic care for post-menopausal women.
desc3: Perfect as a mindful snack, a sophisticated gift, or a sweet pause in your day—experience indulgence that nourishes from within.

name: Little Millet Laddu
desc1: Indulge in the exquisite taste of our artisanal Little Millet Laddus, where ancient grains meet gourmet craftsmanship. Handcrafted with wholesome little millet, golden ghee, creamy butter, natural jiggery powder, crunchy cashews, and a delicate hint of cardamom, each laddu is a luxurious fusion of flavour and wellness.
desc2: These laddus are a rich source of fiber, support heart health, and aid natural detoxification, making them a mindful indulgence that nourishes your body from within.
desc3: Perfect as a sophisticated snack, a thoughtful gift, or a golden pause in your day—experience the harmony of taste, tradition, and wellness in every bite.

name: Millet Penne Pasta
desc1: Experience a bold, gourmet twist on comfort food with this Millet Penne Pasta—where ancient grains meet modern elegance. A curated blend of foxtail, kodo, little and barnyard millets, sorghum, and whole wheat is shaped into classic penne tubes, designed to hold and embrace every layer of flavour.
desc2: Delicately seasoned with toasted coriander, cumin, and fennel, uplifted by turmeric and fragrant curry leaves, and finished with a whisper of cinnamon, clove, and nutmeg—each bite unfolds like a slow, spiced symphony.
desc3: Rooted in tradition yet styled for the refined palate, this is wholesome luxury redefined.
content: Rich Source of Calcium – Supports strong bones and teeth.
Aids in Weight Loss – Keeps you fuller for longer.
Helps Reduce Blood Glucose Levels – Supports healthy sugar control.

Boil noodles in 800 ml water for 5 minutes.
Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix with 1 spoon oil.

Add spice mix, Sauces & Pasta, toss well and serve hot.

name: Millet Fusilli Pasta
desc1: Savour a distinctive expression of Millet Fusilli Pasta, where heritage grains are transformed into graceful spirals of indulgence. desc2: Gently infused with coriander, cumin, and fennel, enriched by the golden warmth of turmeric and fragrant curry leaves, and elevated with delicate hints of cinnamon, clove, and nutmeg, the profile is both deep and refined.
desc3: An elegant interplay of form and flavour—crafted for those who appreciate subtle luxury in every bite.

name: Foxtail Millet Vermicelli
desc1: Foxtail millet vermicelli is a refined blend of premium foxtail millet flour and whole wheat, offering a delicate texture and a naturally elegant taste.
desc2: Light, wholesome, and thoughtfully crafted, it brings a touch of sophistication to everyday meals.
desc3: Enriched with the goodness of millets, it supports improved glycaemic control and serves as a mindful, nourishing choice for those managing diabetes—where wellness meets understated luxury in every strand.
content: Rinse vermicelli in water, drain, and steam for 10 minutes (idly pan or rice cooker).
Add a spoon of oil and mix gently.
Heat 2 tbsp oil, add mustard seeds and urad dal.
Add onion, curry leaves, green chilies, vegetables, and salt; sauté for 2 minutes.
Add cooked vermicelli, cover for a minute, toss well.
Serve hot with chutney.

name: Little Millet Vermicelli
desc1: Little millet vermicelli is a refined celebration of wholesome grains, crafted from premium little millet flour and whole wheat. Light, delicate, and subtly nutty, it brings an air of quiet elegance to every dish.
desc2: Beyond its graceful texture, it is naturally enriched with magnesium and niacin, supporting heart health and helping maintain healthy cholesterol levels.
desc3: Enriched with the goodness of millets, it supports improved glycaemic control and serves as a mindful, nourishing choice for those managing diabetes—where wellness meets understated luxury in every strand.

name: Multi Millet Vermicelli
desc1: Savour the goodness of six ancient millets—foxtail, kodo, little, barnyard, ragi, and bajra—crafted into delicate vermicelli for a wholesome, nourishing experience.
desc2: Naturally rich in dietary fiber, it supports healthy digestion while adding a light, satisfying texture to your meals.
desc3: Perfect for those who value refined taste and mindful nutrition, this gourmet vermicelli transforms everyday dishes into a healthful indulgence, blending tradition with sophistication.
